overview: A modern, responsive art studio website for NAYAAB-E-KALA with an elegant wine, black, and white color palette. Features a hero section, course listings, student gallery, admissions form, and contact details — designed with artistic brush stroke elements and smooth animations.
features: Hero section with studio name and bilingual tagline
Course listings with levels and duration
Wine, black, and white artistic design
Fully responsive mobile and desktop layout
Smooth scroll animations and hover effects
